top_signals.title: U.S. Treasury yields edge higher as Wall Street monitors Middle East tensions
top_signals.summary: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose over 1 basis point to 4.558%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stablecoins vs Traditional Banking
top_signals.summary: A stablecoin is a cryptocurrency pegged to a reference asset, such as the U.S. dollar or Euro. Like a bank, stablecoin issuers hold onto vast amounts of deposits, as they take cash in return for issuing their coin onchain. This makes them similar in some ways to a traditional bank, but the two differ in […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: China's car market heads for worst year since 2021 as sales plunge 20%
top_signals.summary: Consumer demand for cars in China tumbles following record-high sales of 23.7 million units in 2025.
